claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A Canvas-and-Ink static alert with visible localized severity and an independently optional shared-announcer summary.
semantics: Static mode makes no announcement; explicit polite or assertive modes enqueue one concise caller-provided summary through the shared announcer.
A caller-selected h1-h6, visible severity label, distinct symbol, title, and text preserve meaning without color.
Actions retain their own native semantics outside every live region, while the visible hierarchy comes from the caller-selected heading.
live=off mounts no announcement effect and emits no live role, aria-live property, or hidden announcement copy.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve boundaries, text, state, and focus without color-only meaning.
preferences.reducedMotion: No semantic information depends on motion.
preferences.rtl: Logical properties mirror layout and bdi isolates localized numeric values where applicable.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Text wraps, actions reflow, and content remains readable without document clipping or hidden recovery paths.
